name: Beef Goulash
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook the meat and onion in hot oil until the meat is brown.
2. Add the beer, water, tomato paste, paprika, salt, caraway seed, and pepper to the pot.
3. Cover; simmer for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours.
4. Meanwhile, cut potatoes into 1-inch pieces.
5. Add the chopped potatoes, drained sauerkraut, and parsley to the skillet.
6. Cook, covered, for about 20 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
7. Cook, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes or until the mixture is thickened and most of the liquid has evaporated.
8. Serve 4.
